# CliQ
### Compact Lowpass Infrared Quantum Filter
[ Contact sales ](https://www.scalinq.com/solutions/cliq/#cliq-sales)
[ Explore models ](https://www.scalinq.com/solutions/cliq/#cliq-models)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/CliQ-Main-for-carousella-1024x1024.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/CliQ-in-Hand-for-carousella-1024x1024.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/CliQ-Main-for-carousella-1024x1024.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/CliQ-in-Hand-for-carousella-1024x1024.jpg)
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Fridge-w-CliQ.png)
## CliQ – Compact Lowpass Infrared Quantum Filter
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/wave-512px.png)
Low-pass FilterDistributed low-pass filter with superior out-of-band rejection
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/non-magnetic-512px.png)
Fully Non-magneticThe entire assembly, including the IR-absorber, is fully non-magnetic
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/cropped-cropped-puzzle-512px.png)
High CompatibilityFits high-density attenuator blocks and SMA wiring trees
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Cliq-between-icons.png)
A unique combination of high-performance low-pass and infrared filtering. Offering the most compact form factor that is fully non-magnetic and with state-of-the-art performance.
Available as a product family with varying cut-off frequencies including 1 GHz, 5 GHz and 10 GHz
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/wave-2.png)
IR FilterA fully integrated utra-wideband IR-absorber with exceptional out-of-band rejection 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/small-scale-512px.png)
Compact DesignA miniaturized design with a small cross-section dimension 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/SMA-and-SMPM-options.png)
SMPM & SMA VersionsAvailable with several connector options including SMPM and SMA
## Highly flexible setups
### Use Directly In SMA Wiring Trees
Designed for in-line applications, our SMA model fits perfectly in the wiring trees for most cryostats.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/CLIQ-SMA-scaled-e1755616169964.jpg)
### One-Click Plug-In To HD Wiring
The SMPM model is highly compatible with attenuator blocks and high-density connector interfaces in HD cryostats.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/One-click-plug-into-HD-wiring.png)
### Compatible With LINQER
Easily integrable into our complete packaging solution, LINQER. The SMPM model can be connected to separate lines on the LINQER SMPm connector plate.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LINQER36-v2-e1755615968333.jpg)
